description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story apartment building with a flat, gray metal roof and a red brick exterior. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement of large, white-framed windows and two main entrances, one of which is beneath a covered passageway. Vertical white accents separate the window columns, adding a modern touch to the otherwise traditional brickwork. The rear side of the building has a less regular window pattern, with a mix of large and small windows distributed across the facade. The sides of the building are plain, with only a few windows per floor, emphasizing the building's elongated shape. The structure is typical of mid- to late-20th-century urban residential architecture, designed for multi-family occupancy.
description: A three-story red brick apartment building with a flat gray roof, large white-framed windows, and two main entrances. The design is symmetrical and modern, with vertical white accents and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: The front view shows a symmetrical facade with large windows, two main entrances, and vertical white accents.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the building's elongated shape and plain brick wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays an irregular window arrangement with a mix of large and small windows and a covered passageway.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a plain brick wall with a few vertically aligned windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, with vertical alignment and even spacing, while the rear features a more irregular distribution of window sizes and placements.
